name: Add Integers
description: Adds two integers provided via spinboxes.
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

class AddIntegersNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Add Integers"
    description = "Adds two integers provided via spinboxes."
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.icon_path = "icons/plus.svg"
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_exec_input("exec_in")
        self.add_input("a", "int", widget_type="int")
        self.add_input("b", "int", widget_type="int")
        self.add_exec_output("exec_out")
        self.add_output("result", "int")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]
        
    async def execute(self, inputs):
        a_val = inputs.get("a")
        b_val = inputs.get("b")
        a = int(a_val) if a_val is not None else 0
        b = int(b_val) if b_val is not None else 0
        return {"result": a + b}

def register_node():
    return AddIntegersNode
